= re_match


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `pattern`
| `string`
| The pattern to match against.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.matches = this.value.re_match("[0-9]")

# In:  {"value":"there are 10 puppies"}
# Out: {"matches":true}

# In:  {"value":"there are ten puppies"}
# Out: {"matches":false}
----
